titleStmt.title: SII 22.334: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 334. (A.R. No. 334 of 1906) NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT, WALAJAPET TALUK, TIRUMĀLPURAM. RUINED VISHṆU TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. RĀJĀDHIRĀJA (I)—30th YEAR (A.D. 1047-48).

summary.p: This records an agreement given by the servants of the temple of Perumānaḍigaḷ at Gōvindapāḍi (here stated to be situated in Puriśai-nāḍu (not Valla-nāḍu), a division of Maṇaiyiṟ-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻamaṇḍalam, undertaking to meet the expenses of special offerings and worship on the day of Puṇarvasu in Chittirai month every year, with the interest on 30 kāśu which had been invested with them by a lady by name Pārvati-Sāni the wife of Pirāndūr Nāgadōṇa-Kramavittaṉ of Āvipākkam alias Śōḻaśikhāmaṇi-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Kaḷattūr-kōṭṭam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . kovirapāṇṭiyaṉ talaiyum cerala ntaṇṭāṟkoṇṭa kovirācakecaripanmarā
ṉa Uṭaiyār śrī rājādhirājadevaṟku yāṇṭu 3 10Āvatu cayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu maṇaiyi
ṟkoṭṭattu puricaināṭṭu śrī kovintapāṭi niṉṟaruḷina perumānaṭikaḷ kanmikaḷom kaḷattūrkkoṭṭattu Āvipākkamākiya coḻacikāma
ṇiccaruppetimaṅkalattu piṟāntūr nāgadoṇakkiramavittaṉ brāhmaṇi pāṟvaticānipakkal Ivvāḻvārkkuc cittirait tiruppuṇarpūcattu
kku veṇṭu maḻivukku palicaikku vāṅkina kācu muppatu Ikkācu muppatālum kācu 1- kku ku ṭi tiṅkaḷ Araikkāl palicaiyāl Āṇṭu varai mutalāna kācu Añcaraiye Araikkāl Ikkācu Aiñcaraiye Araikkāluṅ koṇṭu cittirait tiruppuṇar pūcattunāḷ pāgāgrat tirumañcaṇamum tiruneyyāṭalukku Eṇṇai patakkum perumāḷukku Amutu ceytaruḷat tiruppoṉakappaḻavarici kalamum palavarkkattilum kaṟiyamutu neyya
mutuḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭu maḻivukku nelluk kalamum śrī vayiṣṇavarkaḷukku Amutu ceyya Arici Irupatu kalamum Ipparicu Āṭṭāṇṭutoṟum ceyvikka kaṭavomāṉom Ivvāḻvār kanmikaḷom ceviceyyātoḻiyil patineṭṭu nāṭṭu śivayiṣṇa varkaḷe tanmātaṉamuḷḷiṭṭut tān veṇṭukovukku manṟiyum paṉṟupāṭiṟuppittum Ittaṉmam celuttuvikkak kaṭavarāka patineṭṭunāṭṭu śrī vayiṣṇavarkaḷ Itu patineṭṭu nāṭṭu śrī vayiṣṇavarkaḷ rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 22.334 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
